description: Agent Guard — automatic prompt-injection screening on every tool call. PreToolUse screens the tool's input params (WebFetch prompt, WebSearch query, Bash command) and denies risky calls; PostToolUse screens the tool's returned content (web page text, file contents, MCP output) and blocks Claude from acting on a flagged result. Both reuse the Content Guard engine and ~/.agent-guard/content_guard.toml.
